age_of_founding.name: The Age of Founding
age_of_founding.description: The first settlers arrived in Aethermoor, establishing the early villages and discovering the land's magical properties.
key_events: Discovery of the Memory Trees in the Whispering Woods
First Academy of Ethereal Arts established
The Great Library of Millbrook founded
The Compact of Knowledge signed between settlements
notable_figures: Erasmus the Wise - First Grand Scholar

golden_age.name: The Golden Age of Knowledge
golden_age.description: A period of great learning and magical advancement, when the realm prospered through the sharing of knowledge.
key_events: The Crystal Caverns of Remembrance discovered
The Great Exchange - scholars from distant lands visit
The Codex of Seasonal Magic compiled
The Floating Gardens of the Academy perfected
notable_figures: Celestine Brightstar - Master of the Academy
Tobias Groundkeeper - Inventor of agricultural magic
Mira the Chronicler - Recorded the first complete histories
achievements: Creation of the first memory crystals
Establishment of the Scholar's Road network

the_shadow_war.name: The Shadow War
the_shadow_war.description: A dark period when the rulers of Shadowmere attempted to hoard all knowledge for themselves, leading to conflict.
key_events: The Siege of Shadowmere Fortress
The Burning of the Forbidden Library
The Battle of the Whispering Woods
The Final Ritual that destroyed Shadowmere
notable_figures: Lord Malachar - The Shadow Lord who started the war
Valerian the Brave - Leader of the resistance
The Circle of Seven - Academy masters who ended the war
consequences: Many ancient texts were lost forever
The realm learned the dangers of hoarding knowledge

age_of_recovery.name: The Age of Recovery
age_of_recovery.description: The realm slowly rebuilt after the Shadow War, with new safeguards to prevent the abuse of knowledge.
key_events: The Charter of Shared Learning established
Millbrook Village rebuilt and expanded
The Academy's protective wards strengthened
The Festival of Remembrance instituted
notable_figures: Elder Aramis - Helped draft the Charter
Kestrel Oakwright - Rebuilt the village smithy
The Wandering Bards - Preserved oral traditions

modern_era.name: The Modern Era
modern_era.description: The current age where the realm enjoys peace and prosperity, with new generations of scholars continuing the tradition.
key_events: The Great Library renovation completed
Discovery of new memory crystal formations
The Academy's exchange program with other realms
The current Chronicle of Seasons begins
current_figures: Finn Oakshield - Master blacksmith and guardian

the_chronicle_of_seasons.name: The Chronicle of Seasons
the_chronicle_of_seasons.description: A magical book that records the ongoing history of Aethermoor, writing itself as events unfold.
powers: Can show glimpses of possible futures

the_first_memory_crystal.name: The First Memory Crystal
the_first_memory_crystal.description: The original crystal that taught the people of Aethermoor how to store memories and knowledge.

the_compact_of_knowledge.name: The Compact of Knowledge
the_compact_of_knowledge.description: The original agreement between settlements to share knowledge freely for the benefit of all.
principles: Teachers have a duty to their students
the_compact_of_knowledge.location: Displayed in the Great Library of Millbrook

festival_of_remembrance.name: Festival of Remembrance
festival_of_remembrance.description: A celebration where the community shares stories, renews knowledge, and honors those who preserved learning.

the_scholars_pilgrimage.name: The Scholar's Pilgrimage
the_scholars_pilgrimage.description: A journey young scholars take to visit all the major sites of learning in the realm.
stops: The Shadowmere Ruins (optional, for advanced students)
the_scholars_pilgrimage.purpose: To understand the full scope of knowledge and its responsibilities

seasonal_magic.description: Magic that draws power from the natural cycles of the seasons

memory_magic.description: The art of storing, sharing, and preserving memories and knowledge
techniques: Crystal encoding - storing memories in crystals
Tree whispers - sharing knowledge with Memory Trees
Mind linking - temporary sharing of thoughts

guardian_magic.description: Protective magic used to safeguard knowledge and people
